title: Nobody knows who i am but im touring the world shredding guitar - 8K HD 2100P 💀
description:
They call me a mystery, a ghost, or just "that bag head guy." While the world tries to figure out who is behind the mask, I let the fretboard do the talking. From underground clubs to massive festival stages, this is the reality of touring the world as a completely anonymous guitar virtuoso
